widgetData.source_sentence: What is the credit hour load?
sentences: Received: 4 credit hours.
Part-time: typically 6–8 credits per term, this class is 2.
Credit hour load: 1.5 hours.

widgetData.source_sentence: Who has authority for final grade requests?
sentences: What is the attendance policy?
Audit code: R, always equivalent to 0 credit, but fees may still apply.
Grade authority: Prof. Sun-Jung Kim, Dr. Avery McGregor, Dr. Fahad Jameel (jameel@northarea.edu). All appeals must be emailed.
Secondary TAs: Lena Müller and Chayan Biswas.
Supervising faculty: Prof. Taylor Moya, Dr. Seung Ahn.
Credits per class: 3.
Weekly pollsters: Dr. Anna Massoud, Prof. Darius Okoye.
Course assistants this term: Ximena Michel and Seth Downey.
Grading TAs: Miho Saito and Victor Ortiz.

widgetData.source_sentence: Who will support main lecture slide posting as TA?
sentences: Slide uploads: Brittany Stewart and Daniel Simmel.
This course's teachers: Dr. Paula Gillespie and Dr. Nikola Petrovic.
Canvas communications are handled equally by Ewan McLean (ewanm@coll.edu), Maryse Rodrigues, and Soonjin Ko (skoon@coll.edu). Use '@TA' to get a quick response.
